name: runcode
description: Secure SSH access from Codex into RunCode cloud development workspaces.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to RunCode cloud workspaces over SSH.
interface.longDescription: RunCode gives Codex low-friction SSH access to your RunCode cloud development environments. It mints short-lived workspace-scoped credentials, pins the gateway host key, keeps SSH session material isolated, and can optionally write SSH config aliases for Codex App remote projects.
